Gengar is the perfect Pokémon.

He’s essential to every trainer’s starting 6, with a versatile and unpredictable moveset. 

If he’s taken damage? Hypnosis —> Dream Eater will put your opponent to sleep, suck their HP, and replenish yours. With the right trainer, he can’t be killed. 

Not to mention he’s immune to normal, fighting, and ground-type moves, rendering even the strongest Pokémon like Machamp absolutely useless. 

Beyond his obvious tactical advantages, Gengar’s aesthetic is big and

watch or get banned 

piped.video/kHezP48LFaU?si=BxXy…

Welp. The bosses called

Turns out I’m too valuable of a WWE Superstar to be fighting bums

I want to take this opportunity to congratulate @LeVeonBell and @BreidenFehoko for their 15 minutes of relevancy. Now back to being broke and retired 

I’m going back to RAW every Monday on Netflix @WWE

Yes but you about to make me $2M


Tom Brady (@TomBrady)

Is this my fault? 😅

Will I get a response?

This is so great


Breiden Fehoko (@BreidenFehoko)

Send it fuck boy



— https://nitter.net/BreidenFehoko/status/2030019917593063908#m

Le’Veon Bell claims he’s down to fight me for $1M NEXT WEEKEND!! 10oz gloves, no headgear, 3 minute rounds until someone says “I quit!” or gets KO’d 🤪

I’m 99.9% sure I know how this will go but what do y’all think. 

When does Le’Veon quit?

10 oz gloves
No headgear
3 min rounds until someone quits  

Next weekend
$1M bet (money in escrow) 
No judges. You choose referee

Down for Boxing or MMA. Just lmk

Deal? Will have contract drawn up & sent


Le'Veon Bell (@LeVeonBell)

bro wants to spar! 😂 lol that’s fine bro, we can SPAR if that’s what you wanna do .. let’s PRACTICE 😂 .. and sure, $1m bet .. but we run rounds until 1st person quit then .. no need for YOUR JUDGES and CAMERAS ON FOR SURE! no need to hide it from the public,

My $1,000,000 open bet to fight NFL players has caused an uproar

Here’s the update:  

Nobody is willing to put $1M in escrow and be flown here to Puerto Rico (all expenses paid) & box with three professional judges 

They all want to formalize this with a streamer, venue, press conferences, etc. (i.e. get paid to fight but not risk their own money), but I don’t have time nor interest in that. 

I won’t step away from WWE to coordinate & train for an event, but if any player wants to actually p

Just a reminder of what happened the last time NFL players lined up (literally) to fight me

Video
This will be the easiest $3M of my life

piped.video/TfeensR9t0w

Stayed up until 2am in a bidding war trying to win Hulk Hogan’s worn & signed boots from Wrestlemania 1

The inscription read “These are my real boots with my real blood on them from MSG, Hulk Hogan.”

I tapped out at $1,021,000. Gg to the winner

Had 3 eliminations in the chamber
Clearly the MVP
Screwed over by a dbag 

Everyone knows I should have won tonight and be main eventing Wrestlemania. Shame on the referees and executives for allowing such unprofessionalism to take place

I am your inevitable champion, deal w/ it
The WWE Banned Me
I’m Done With the WWE

I Survived the World’s Most Dangerous Gym (Diamond Gym)
Opening $1,500,000 in Pokemon Boxes (Official Stream)
Mark Zuckerberg Showed Me Secret Future Tech

This is the grail 1st edition Jungle card… @Ripit
Get me my money @Floyd Mayweather #poweredbypolymarket
We Made a $300,000,000 Movie in 7 Days Using AI
Sold a Pokémon card for $16.5M last night 🤷🏼‍♂️ @Ripit

Goodbye my friend 😢 What a privilege it’s been to be the owner of the greatest collectible in the world. From Guinness World Records to WWE debuts, Netflix to National News, this card and I have been on a generational run. Tomorrow night she finds a new home on Goldin Auctions as we live stream the entire sale on my YT channel… we’ll also be breaking open $1,500,000 in Pokémon boxes so make sure to tune in for a stream of the ages —> 9pm EST tomorrow (Sunday) night 🗓️  This sorta feels like that
My last walk with the Illustrator 🥲
The NFL is cute @Tom Brady

This Sunday, the auction for the Holy Grail of Pokémon closes. The current bid is at $6.3M, already making it a two-time Guinness world record setting collectible.  By this time next week, someone will own this franchise-defining piece of history We’ll be live streaming it all LIVE on my YouTube channel as we’re breaking open a $1,400,000 1st Edition & Legendary Collection box of Pokémon cards. I am GASSED 🔥 9pm EST, this Sunday on my YT channel. See you there
THIS PACK 😳 Opening a $10k pack of 1st Edition Pokémon cards at the Big Game Share this video and follow @Ripit to win these cards (except the Grass Energy, I gave it to Jessica Alba’s son lol)

Surprise :) I’m cracking open a free box of Pokémon Legendary Collection as a thank you to the buyers of my 1st Edition Break happening February 15th My second case of Legendary Collection is also live at auction right now on Goldin.com Mark your calendars — 2/15 @ 9p EST LIVE on my YouTube
